Bash(cd D:/Study/AILearning/MLProjects/MultiAgentDevTeam && powershell -Command "
[xml]\\$xml = Get-Content 'coverage/a60cdfb2-b3a0-497e-a44b-64e3298c93aa/coverage.cobertura.xml'
\\$root = \\$xml.coverage
Write-Host \('Overall Line Coverage:   {0:P1}' -f [double]\\$root.'line-rate'\)
Write-Host \('Overall Branch Coverage: {0:P1}' -f [double]\\$root.'branch-rate'\)
Write-Host \('Lines Covered: {0} / {1}' -f \\$root.'lines-covered', \\$root.'lines-valid'\)
Write-Host ''
Write-Host 'Per Package:'
foreach \(\\$pkg in \\$root.packages.package\) {
    \\$name = \\$pkg.name
    \\$lr = [double]\\$pkg.'line-rate' * 100
    \\$br = [double]\\$pkg.'branch-rate' * 100
    Write-Host \('{0,-52} Line: {1,5:F1}%  Branch: {2,5:F1}%' -f \\$name, \\$lr, \\$br\)
}
")

Bash(cd D:/Study/AILearning/MLProjects/MultiAgentDevTeam && powershell -Command "
\\$pkg = Get-ChildItem 'D:/Study/AILearning/shared_Environment/.nuget/packages/anthropic.sdk' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select -First 1
if \(\\$pkg\) { ls \\$pkg.FullName }
" 2>&1 | head -20)

Bash(cd "D:/Study/AILearning/MLProjects/MultiAgentDevTeam" && powershell -Command "
[xml]\\$unit = Get-Content 'tests/MultiAgentDevTeam.UnitTests/TestResults/e9e4ca5b-3d6d-4bad-b238-b55f4ea3ae67/coverage.cobertura.xml'
[xml]\\$integration = Get-Content 'tests/MultiAgentDevTeam.IntegrationTests/TestResults/4c0b59d4-7674-4a67-a6ec-4ba893293796/coverage.cobertura.xml'

Write-Host '=== UNIT TESTS COVERAGE ==='
Write-Host \('Line Rate: ' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$unit.coverage.'line-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
Write-Host \('Branch Rate: ' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$unit.coverage.'branch-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== Per Package ==='
foreach \(\\$pkg in \\$unit.coverage.packages.package\) {
    Write-Host \(\\$pkg.name + ': Line=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'line-rate' * 100, 2\) + '% Branch=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'branch-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
}

Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== INTEGRATION TESTS COVERAGE ==='
Write-Host \('Line Rate: ' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$integration.coverage.'line-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
Write-Host \('Branch Rate: ' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$integration.coverage.'branch-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== Per Package ==='
foreach \(\\$pkg in \\$integration.coverage.packages.package\) {
    Write-Host \(\\$pkg.name + ': Line=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'line-rate' * 100, 2\) + '% Branch=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'branch-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
}
")

Bash(cd "D:/Study/AILearning/MLProjects/MultiAgentDevTeam" && powershell -Command "
[xml]\\$unit = Get-Content 'tests/MultiAgentDevTeam.UnitTests/TestResults/f3b9a7eb-39af-4aac-8001-5bffb4250809/coverage.cobertura.xml'
[xml]\\$integration = Get-Content 'tests/MultiAgentDevTeam.IntegrationTests/TestResults/7294885d-c4b6-4fe0-98c1-690d81a7cebd/coverage.cobertura.xml'

Write-Host '=== UNIT TESTS ==='
Write-Host \('Line: ' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$unit.coverage.'line-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%  Branch: ' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$unit.coverage.'branch-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
foreach \(\\$pkg in \\$unit.coverage.packages.package\) {
    Write-Host \('  ' + \\$pkg.name + ': Line=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'line-rate' * 100, 2\) + '% Branch=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'branch-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
}
Write-Host ''
Write-Host '=== INTEGRATION TESTS ==='

foreach \(\\$pkg in \\$integration.coverage.packages.package\) {
    Write-Host \('  ' + \\$pkg.name + ': Line=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'line-rate' * 100, 2\) + '% Branch=' + [math]::Round\([double]\\$pkg.'branch-rate' * 100, 2\) + '%'\)
}
")
